summary: PR #2564 matched a batch of src/melee/mn menu/records functions across mnruleplus, mnnamenew, mndiagram2, mnvibration, mnsoundtest, mndatadel, mninfo, mnsnap, and mncount, with accompanying header/prototype adjustments and small data/static-header edits. The PR body claims require-protos plus ninja verification; the bot report records 21 new matches and several unmatched-item improvements.

key_files.role: Largest changed source file; PR body claims matches for mnVibration_80248444, mnVibration_80248644, mnVibration_80248ED4, and mnVibration_80249174; bot report also records mnvibration .data and .sdata completion.
evidence_refs: text_corpus: decomp-dev bot report 21 new matches

key_files.role: Matched mnInfo_80251D58, mnInfo_80251F04, mnInfo_802522B8 and improved adjacent info logic using data-layout struct access, adjusted signatures, local slot pointer arithmetic, and dont_inline pragmas.
evidence_refs: diff_excerpt: MnInfoDataLayout, mnInfo_80251D58 signature/layout->date_format/time_format, mnInfo_80251F04 slot handling
text_corpus: bot report mnInfo matches and improvements

key_files.role: Matched mn_80232D4C and improved related mnruleplus data/sdata/sdata2 items per bot report.
evidence_refs: text_corpus: bot report mnruleplus function and data improvements

key_files.role: Improved adjacent count-row logic by extracting repeated unlocked-character/map loops into static inline helpers and removing a PAD_STACK use.
evidence_refs: human_pr_text: mnCount_GetRowValue_Character and adjacent count-row logic

key_files.role: Matched mnDiagram2_GetStatValue and mnDiagram2_UpdateScrollArrows; used a u16 temporary for repeated stat reads and a temporary data-layout struct for animation settings.
evidence_refs: diff_excerpt: val16 in mnDiagram2_GetStatValue and MnDiagram2DataLayout in mnDiagram2_UpdateScrollArrows

key_files.role: Matched mnDataDel_80250170 by introducing archive/assets locals and indexing a contiguous StaticModelDesc asset layout in lbArchive_LoadSections.
evidence_refs: diff_excerpt: archive/assets locals and assets[0..2] StaticModelDesc indexing

key_files.role: Adjusted diagram helper signatures and casts for is_name_mode, with MNDIAGRAM_SOURCE guarding header-visible prototype differences.
evidence_refs: diff_excerpt: MNDIAGRAM_SOURCE define and int/u8 signature changes

key_files.role: Header prototype updates, including conditional prototype surface for mnDiagram_GetPlayPercentage.
Static data literal cleanup using explicit float suffixes in AnimLoopSettings and Vec3 initializers.
Matched AddCharacterToName and mnNameNew_8023E0D8 per PR body and bot report.
Matched mnSoundTest_8024A790 per PR body and bot report.
Matched mnSnap_80253BE0 and fn_80257D7C per PR body and bot report.
Header/prototype surface changed for mninfo matched functions.
Header/prototype surface changed for mnruleplus matched function work.
Header/prototype surface changed for mnvibration matched function work.
Header/prototype surface changed for mnnamenew matched function work.

what_changed: Matched 21 items per bot report, including mnvibration functions/data, AddCharacterToName, mnNameNew_8023E0D8, mnDiagram2_GetStatValue, mnDiagram2_UpdateScrollArrows, mnSoundTest_8024A790, mnDataDel_80250170, mnInfo_80251D58, mnInfo_80251F04, mnInfo_802522B8, mnSnap_80253BE0, fn_80257D7C, mnCount_GetRowValue_Character, and mn_80232D4C.
Updated headers for diagram/info/ruleplus/vibration/name-new functions, with PR verification explicitly naming `python configure.py --require-protos && ninja`.
Extracted repeated unlocked-character and unlocked-map loops in mncount into static inline helpers and reused them from multiple switch cases.
Introduced temporary local layout structs in mninfo and mndiagram2 to access mixed static data blobs as structured fields rather than isolated raw globals.
Adjusted function signatures and casts around `is_name_mode` in mndiagram/mndiagram2, including a conditional header prototype guarded by MNDIAGRAM_SOURCE.
Used locals for archive/assets in mnDataDel_80250170 and indexed contiguous StaticModelDesc entries in an lbArchive_LoadSections call.
Kept or introduced narrow matching controls in mninfo with `#pragma push`, `#pragma dont_inline on`, and `#pragma pop` around specific functions.
smart_moves: Moved repeated count loops into static inline helpers instead of preserving duplicate switch-case bodies; this also removed an existing PAD_STACK in mnCount_GetRowValue_Number.
Used a `u16 val16` temporary in mnDiagram2_GetStatValue for several name-vs-fighter stat cases, reducing repeated direct returns and likely matching a common load/return shape.
Modeled static data layout locally with MnDiagram2DataLayout and MnInfoDataLayout so code could address animation settings and format strings through typed fields.
Passed the dereferenced gmMainLib_8015D804 result into mnInfo_80251D58, changing the signature to carry the value used for datetime formatting.
Documented narrow verification in the PR body with require-protos plus ninja, and the bot report recorded concrete function-level match deltas.

decomp_lessons.lesson: When repeated switch cases count unlocked menu entities with the same loop shape, extracting a static inline helper can both improve readability and preserve matchability.
evidence_refs: diff_excerpt: mnCount_CountUnlockedChars and mnCount_CountUnlockedMaps reused in SHORTEST_TIME, AVAILABLE_CHARACTERS, AVAILABLE_MAPS
text_corpus: bot report mnCount_GetRowValue_Character reaches 100% and mnCount_GetRowValue_Number improves

decomp_lessons.lesson: For menu static-data blobs that combine IDs, animation settings, and strings, a small local layout struct can express intended offsets better than unrelated globals or repeated raw address access.
Prototype changes should be paired with header updates and require-protos verification when matching recovered function bodies.
evidence_refs: changed_files.jsonl: mndiagram.h, mninfo.h, mnruleplus.h, mnvibration.h, mnnamenew.h changed

naming_conventions.name: mnCount_CountUnlockedChars / mnCount_CountUnlockedMaps
naming_conventions.lesson: Names describe the recovered local role of duplicated loops without over-renaming external gm_* calls.
evidence_refs: diff_excerpt: new static inline helper names in mncount.c

naming_conventions.name: MnDiagram2DataLayout / MnInfoDataLayout
naming_conventions.lesson: Temporary data-layout typedefs were named by owning module and role, then scoped to the source file.

naming_conventions.name: archive / assets / data / text / slot
naming_conventions.lesson: Local variable names in shown hunks use short role names for clear object categories rather than temp_rXX names.
evidence_refs: diff_excerpt: mnInfo_80251D58 and mnInfo_80251F04 data/text/slot locals

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: Extract duplicate loops into static inline helpers while preserving exact integer counters and casts to u8 where needed.
evidence_refs: diff_excerpt: `for (i = 0; i < NUM_CHARACTERS; i++)` with `gm_8016400C((u8) i)`
diff_excerpt: `for (i = 0; i < NUM_STAGES; i++)` with `gm_801641CC((u8) i)`

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: Use a narrow local data-layout struct to recover offset-based access into static data.
Adjust function signatures to int for callsite match while casting to u8 at branch/use sites.
evidence_refs: diff_excerpt: mnDiagram_GetHitPercentage and mnDiagram_GetAveragePlayerCount changed from u8 to int for is_name_mode
diff_excerpt: calls from mnDiagram2_GetStatValue pass is_name_mode without u8 cast

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: Use narrow `#pragma dont_inline` blocks around specific mninfo functions.
evidence_refs: diff_excerpt: `#pragma push`, `#pragma dont_inline on`, `#pragma pop` around mnInfo_80251D58 and mnInfo_80251F04

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: Remove PAD_STACK where refactoring made it unnecessary for the adjacent count-row value function.

accepted_candidate_records.title: Repeated menu count loops may become static inline helpers
accepted_candidate_records.text: In PR #2564, duplicated unlocked-character/map counting loops in mncount were extracted into static inline helpers and reused by multiple row-value cases; the bot report recorded mnCount_GetRowValue_Character reaching 100% and mnCount_GetRowValue_Number improving.

accepted_candidate_records.title: Local layout structs can clarify mixed menu static-data blobs
accepted_candidate_records.text: PR #2564 used MnInfoDataLayout and MnDiagram2DataLayout to access animation settings and format strings through typed fields, avoiding less-informative raw data access in the shown hunks.

source_update_candidates.title: Require evidence when retaining local dont_inline pragmas for matching
source_update_candidates.text: PR #2564 shows narrow `#pragma dont_inline on` blocks around matched mninfo functions. This supports reminding curators that pragma-based matching tactics should stay tightly scoped and tied to function-level match evidence.
evidence_refs: diff_excerpt: pragma push/dont_inline/pop around mnInfo_80251D58 and mnInfo_80251F04
text_corpus: bot report mnInfo_80251D58 and mnInfo_80251F04 100%
source_update_candidates.reason: This is already aligned with loaded standards avoid-pragmas-register-asm and matching-tactics-need-evidence; curator may decide whether this PR is useful as an example.

source_update_candidates.title: src/melee/mn menu record functions often share static data layout and helper patterns
source_update_candidates.text: In PR #2564, menu record matches touched mncount, mndiagram2, mninfo, mndatadel, mnnamenew, mnruleplus, mnsnap, mnsoundtest, and mnvibration. Visible hunks used static inline helpers for repeated counts and local data-layout structs for static menu data.
evidence_refs: diff_excerpt: mncount helpers and data-layout structs
source_update_candidates.reason: Candidate path fact only; do not promote without curator checking more mn menu PRs or current source patterns.

rejection_notes: Do not infer reviewer intent or review approval details; no review comments or reviews were loaded.
Do not generalize the MNDIAGRAM_SOURCE conditional-prototype pattern as a standard from this single PR; it may be a local matching workaround.
Do not treat the large odd float table in mninfo as semantically understood; the visible diff only supports that it was moved/used as a data-layout base for matching.
Do not claim all touched files' internal tactics from the truncated diff; for several files only changed-file metadata, PR body claims, and bot match rows are loaded.
